text:
- Update to snapshot r5990
  (somewhat belatedly, I was waiting for newer snapshots to be released
  after the ports tree had been thawed but that did not happen.)
- Change my mail address to improve reachability from "evil" netblocks,
  esp. China and Korea. NetCologne currently filters quite aggressively
  at IP level.
